name: Baking Soda (Sodium Bicarbonate)
description: A mild alkaline salt with pH ~8.3 in solution, functioning as an acid neutralizer, gentle abrasive, and deodorizer.
appearance: White crystalline powder or fine granules; odorless
solubility: 96 g/L in water at 20°C; insoluble in ethanol
chemistry: Mild alkaline (pH ~8.3). Neutralizes acids produced by oral bacteria (S. mutans). Mild abrasive with very low RDA score (~7 vs 70–150 for commercial pastes). In deodorant, neutralizes acidic sweat compounds that cause odor.
warnings: Can irritate sensitive underarm skin at high concentrations. Keep ratio 1:3 to 1:6 with carrier.
